title: Determine the exact value of R(C9, C9, C9)
micro_paper_assessment: Target remains micro-paper eligible, but this run only isolates a theorem-facing stability slice; it does not yet produce an exact value or a publishable packet.
family_affinity: high; bounded odd-cycle diagonal Bondy-Erdos stability lane
generalization_signal: moderate; the neighborhood path obstruction and one-vertex extension obstruction scale to C_{2m+1}, but the global four-block stability step is still missing
candidate_theorem_slice: In the standard four-block 32-vertex lower-bound scaffold, any added vertex that uses the color of a quotient edge on both incident blocks of that edge creates a monochromatic C9.
next_action: Either prove a four-block stability reduction from the P8-free neighborhood constraint, or fix a canonical 32-vertex lower-bound witness and run a tightly-scoped search over admissible 33rd-vertex attachment signatures.
